creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
This is to record a pointer to a second PR for the same problem, which
has not been submitted as a followup correctly.  It's i386/3316, which
i'm going to close now.

Please submit followups to freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org (also
known as bugs-followup@freebsd.org), with a subject containing the PR
# from your original submission.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
